subject: Add dummy script for k8s CSIT to generate jenkins result files
commit_message:
Add dummy script for k8s CSIT to generate jenkins result files

Added a script for k8s CSIT that creates dummy robot result files.
This is required for jenkins job verification

Issue-ID: POLICY-4541
Signed-off-by: zrrmmua <ramesh.murugan.iyer@est.tech>
Change-Id: I18965b45d3579c8593ce817440d3ec10d7b17662
